Package neqsim.process.safety.fire

Class PfpDemandCalculator.PfpDemandResult

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.fire.PfpDemandCalculator.PfpDemandResult
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
PfpDemandCalculator
public static class PfpDemandCalculator.PfpDemandResult extends Object implements Serializable
Immutable result of a PFP demand evaluation.
